tools.name: list_documents
tools.description: List all mkdshare.DEV documents owned by or shared with the authenticated user.

tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Read the full markdown content of a document by its slug.

tools.name: update_document
tools.description: Update an existing document you own. Omit any field to keep its current value.

tools.name: list_annotations
tools.description: List all annotations (comments) on a document.

tools.name: create_annotation
tools.description: Add an annotation (comment) to a document. Pass quoted_text with the exact passage you want to annotate — the server will locate it automatically. Omit quoted_text to attach to the whole document. You can also provide start_offset + end_offset explicitly if needed.

tools.name: archive_document
tools.description: Archive a document. For documents you own, archives it for everyone. For shared documents, archives it only for you.

tools.name: search_documents
tools.description: Search mkdshare.DEV documents by title and content. Returns documents owned by or shared with the authenticated user that match the query.

tools.name: request_device_auth
tools.description: Start a headless Google sign-in. Call this FIRST if you don't have an API token yet. Returns a user_code and verification_url for the user to visit, plus a device_code to use with poll_device_auth. No Bearer token required.

tools.name: poll_device_auth
tools.description: Check whether the user has approved the device authorization. Call every 5 seconds (or the interval returned by a slow_down response) until status is 'complete'. Save the returned api_token to your MCP server config.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "request_device_auth" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
